nasb.text: Now Elijah said to Ahab, “Go up, eat and drink; for there is the sound of the roar of a heavy shower.”

esv.text: And Elijah said to Ahab, “Go up, eat and drink, for there is a sound of the rushing of rain.”

cnv.text: 以利亞對亞哈說：“你上去吃喝吧！因為已經有下大雨的響聲了。”

ccb.text: 以利亚对亚哈说：“你去吃喝吧，因为我已听见大雨将临的声音。”
